payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden recessed-panel upper wall cabinet door, vertically oriented and wall-mounted with its left edge cropped by the image border; visible wood grain and slight surface wear, no handle visible, approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.
